test.create_query: CREATE TABLE tab ( id UInt64, message String, INDEX idx(message) TYPE text(tokenizer = 'splitByNonAlpha') ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO tab SELECT number, if(number % 100 = 0, repeat('clickhouse is a fast column oriented database system ', 4), repeat('the quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog near the river ', 4)) FROM numbers(10000000)
test.query: SELECT count() FROM tab WHERE message LIKE '%clickhouse%'
SELECT count() FROM tab WHERE message ILIKE '%CLICKHOUSE%'
